'''matoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uvedalin|uvedalin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-t-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uvedalin|uvedalin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| matoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæteheth|mæteheth]] || [[word:mætehej|mætehej]] || [[word:mætehesh|mætehesh]] || [[word:mætehe|mætehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:matotohoth|matotohoth]] || [[word:matotohoj|matotohoj]] || [[word:matotohosh|matotohosh]] || [[word:matotoho|matotoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:matohoth|matohoth]] || [[word:matohoj|matohoj]] || [[word:matohosh|matohosh]] || [[word:matoho|matoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:matofhoth|matofhoth]] || [[word:matofhoj|matofhoj]] || [[word:matofhosh|matofhosh]] || [[word:matofhof|matofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:matohotho|matohotho]] || [[word:matohojo|matohojo]] || [[word:matohosho|matohosho]] || [[word:matohoko|matohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:matohoth|matohoth]] || [[word:matohoj|matohoj]] || [[word:matohosh|matohosh]] || [[word:matoho|matoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:matohothol|matohothol]] || [[word:matohojol|matohojol]] || [[word:matohoshol|matohoshol]] || [[word:matohokol|matohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:matohothotho|matohothotho]] || [[word:matohojojo|matohojojo]] || [[word:matohoshosho|matohoshosho]] || [[word:matohoko|matohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:matohothon|matohothon]] || [[word:matohojon|matohojon]] || [[word:matohoshon|matohoshon]] || [[word:matohokon|matohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:matohothoro|matohothoro]] || [[word:matohojoro|matohojoro]] || [[word:matohoshoro|matohoshoro]] || [[word:matohokoro|matohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
